summary: Swiss Technical Theme UI/UX Redesign Testing - Comprehensive code review and visual testing performed. Theme implementation is 95% complete with minor remaining hardcoded colors identified in CollegeAdminDashboard and HomeModule.

issues: Lines 670-673: Priority indicator colors still use hardcoded Tailwind classes (border-l-red-500, border-l-orange-500, border-l-yellow-500, border-l-blue-500) instead of theme-aware classes (border-destructive, border-warning, border-info, border-muted)
Line 357: Uses hardcoded from-gray-500 instead of theme color for Services icon gradient
TenantManagement.js line 251, AdminDashboard.js line 112, SetupPassword.js: Use from-slate-50 via-slate-100 background gradients instead of theme bg-muted or bg-background

action_items: Replace border-l-red-500 with border-destructive in CollegeAdminDashboard.js line 670
Replace border-l-orange-500 with border-warning in CollegeAdminDashboard.js line 671
Replace border-l-yellow-500 with border-warning/50 in CollegeAdminDashboard.js line 672
Replace border-l-blue-500 with border-info in CollegeAdminDashboard.js line 673
Replace from-gray-500 with from-muted-foreground in HomeModule.js line 357
critical_code_review_comments: Theme implementation is largely successful - 2288 color replacements across 60 files worked well
CSS variables properly defined in index.css with semantic naming
Tailwind config correctly maps theme colors
Minor hardcoded colors remain in priority indicators and some admin page backgrounds
The toast.jsx red-* classes are acceptable as they're for destructive toasts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Swiss Technical theme is implemented. Login page has split-layout with dark navy left panel. Dashboard has 280px dark navy sidebar. All modules use theme-aware classes (primary, secondary, muted, destructive, success, warning, info). Minor hardcoded colors remain in CollegeAdminDashboard priority indicators and HomeModule Services icon. Onboarding modal blocks navigation - need to complete it to test modules.

theme_verification.login_page: PASS - Dark navy left panel, white auth form, feature pills with muted styling
theme_verification.dashboard_sidebar: PASS - 280px dark navy sidebar with proper navigation
theme_verification.onboarding_modal: PASS - Dark navy header, success checkmark, clean layout
theme_verification.css_variables: PASS - Properly defined in index.css lines 25-91
theme_verification.tailwind_config: PASS - Theme colors correctly mapped in tailwind.config.js

module_theme_usage.BirthdayModule: PASS - Uses theme-aware classes (text-destructive for cake icon)

toast.jsx: Line 62: red-300, red-50, red-400, red-600 (acceptable for destructive toasts)
